title: 9 Signs Your Phone Is Winning
caption:
This is his generation's battle. His grandfather never had it.

The phone is where lust lives, where envy lives, where his time dies. If a man can't put it down, something other than Christ owns him. And a thing that owns you doesn't just affect your mornings — it shapes your character, your attention, your relationships, your prayer life.

The guy who thinks he has it under control usually has the worst track record. The man who names it for what it is — a fight worth fighting — is the one who starts winning it.

This isn't a detox. This is a war. Fight it like one.

"Whatever is true, whatever is honorable, whatever is just — think about these things." — Philippians 4:8. Not whatever is trending.

Save this for the brother who needs to hear it. Or send it and say nothing.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #scripture #christianity #discipline #masculinity
